title: scleranthus perennis subsp. burnatii
intro: Scleranthus perennis subsp. burnatii, also known as annual knawel, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scleranthus perennis subsp. burnatii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune system function. It is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
